message:
test: add tests for clipboard, PromptDetailModal, ShareDialog, moderation report

Add 44 new tests across 4 test files for previously untested modules:
- clipboard.test.ts: 9 tests covering Clipboard API, textarea fallback, cleanup
- PromptDetailModal.test.tsx: 16 tests covering rendering, copy, install, variables
- ShareDialog.test.tsx: 16 tests covering create, copy, revoke, social share, visibility
- moderation/report/route.test.ts: 3 tests verifying re-export binding

Test suite: 189 files, 3319 tests passing (up from 3275)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
